DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS11-L1-BR300-HSVPAMA1112-DBC-IFN-02 • HS Visual & Performing Arts: Media Arts 11-12 • Organize and Develop Artistic Ideas and Work

The Order of the Frame

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a student. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the conversation mainly about?
2QUESTION 2: According to the teacher, what does the student's current opening do?
3QUESTION 3: What does the teacher want the student to recognize?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
